groups.theme: Users wanting a safe, companion-like source of emotional support
example_reviews: more like my good friend.. light of my loneliness...
it really makes me feel great that I can move on now.
groups.notes: I refined the automated theme from a broad positive-emotion label to a clearer user-situation theme focused on companion-like support, comfort, and privacy.

groups.theme: Users seeking anxiety and stress relief
example_reviews: this app help calm me during anxiety and is definitely one of the better self care apps
it relieves my anxiety, overall it's a really good app and it listens well
groups.notes: I kept this automated group mostly unchanged because the theme is coherent and the included reviews consistently focus on anxiety, stress, overthinking, and coping support.

groups.theme: Users expressing strong appreciation for the app’s helpfulness and accessibility
example_reviews: thank you for developing this app i am really thankfull to you
Woah, just 7MB for a life-saving bot? Wysa has helped me extremely and I really appreciate it!
groups.notes: I removed review_id 05d4b308-6c76-4d98-9f90-79cda89e2f5f because it describes a login/access problem and does not fit an appreciation theme. The remaining reviews consistently express gratitude, usefulness, and low-friction access.

groups.theme: Users frustrated by AI quality, customer support, or pricing
example_reviews: Doesn't acknowledge anything I say and has its own random conversation with itself. Couldn't even call it functional. Terrible app.
doesn't really seem to be a fair price tbh, it's a extremely high sub cost...
groups.notes: I changed the automated theme title into specific dissatisfaction themes that are more useful for later requirements and testing.

groups.theme: Users reporting meaningful mental-health improvement and recovery
example_reviews: I am slowly recovering from mental breakdown, but this app is really helpful.
this helped me with my depression and mental health so much!
groups.notes: I changed the automated theme title to fit more into the project which will be used later for testing.
